llm_instruction: This file contains only BASF jobs in Taiwan. Filter this file before loading wider Asia data. For role-specific searches, use the field JSON files when available. Copy job URLs exactly and never generate basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Officer, Supply Chain
jobs.description: About BASF At BASF, we create chemistry for a sustainable future. We combine economic success with environmental protection and social responsibility. Around 112,000 employees in the BASF Group contribute to the success of our customers in nearly all sectors and almost every country in the world. Our portfolio comprises six segments: Chemicals, Materials, Industrial Solutions, Surface Technologies, Nutrition Care and Agricultural Solutions. BASF generated sales of €65.3 billion in 2024. BASF shares are traded on the stock exchange in Frankfurt (BAS) and as American Depositary Receipts (BASFY) in the United States. Further information at www.basf.com . Objectives of the Position Develop, monitor and review the implementation of all logistics activities required for the timely and distribution of company products, equipment and materials according to relevant business strategies/ policies and procedures/ practices, corporate/company and government EHS regulations in handling product transportation and safeguard a reliable order processing and stock level. How You Will Do It Main Tasks 1. Planning According to sales forecast convert to material/package purchase plan/tolling plan. Put

jobs.title: Technician, Production
jobs.description: About BASF At BASF, we create chemistry for a sustainable future. We combine economic success with environmental protection and social responsibility. Around 112,000 employees in the BASF Group contribute to the success of our customers in nearly all sectors and almost every country in the world. Our portfolio comprises six segments: Chemicals, Materials, Industrial Solutions, Surface Technologies, Nutrition Care and Agricultural Solutions. BASF generated sales of €65.3 billion in 2024. BASF shares are traded on the stock exchange in Frankfurt (BAS) and as American Depositary Receipts (BASFY) in the United States. Further information at www.basf.com . Objectives of the Position According to the defined production processes and quality requirements, you are required to schedule and plan in line with Company EHS guideline, properly operate the machines/equipment, and handle the chemical raw materials to fabricate the products that meet the requirements in quantity, quality, schedule, and process. jobs.title: Manager, Order to Invoice (OTI)
jobs.description: 1. Strategic business engagement: Participate in the development and implementation of G-EDM's business strategy, process improvements, and digitalization initiatives. Enhance business competitiveness by introducing new concepts and establishing expert networks. Advocate for process improvements and digitalization to relevant stakeholders. 2. Process Improvement Digitalization - NGBA steering associated improvements: As the global point of contact for G-EDM Order to Invoice (OTI) processes, lead participate in the development, optimization and automation of processes related to OTI domain. Guide Customer Service Leads across countries to define the NGBA end-state solution and finalize process models. Conduct regular analysis of existing processes and IT environment for further development. 3. Change Management - Technical Organizational: Identify global/country specific features and enable NGBA workshops for Order to Invoice (OTI). Drive role-based training for users across G-EDM. Develop user documentation, process descriptions, guidelines, and procedural instructions. 4. Stakeholder Management Global Coordination: Provide updates to key stakeholders on NGBA implementation progres

jobs.title: Supervisor, Transport Management
jobs.description: 1. Strategic business engagement: Participate in the development and implementation of G-EDM's business strategy, process improvements, and digitalization initiatives. Enhance business competitiveness by introducing new concepts and establishing expert networks. Advocate for process improvements and digitalization to relevant stakeholders. 2. Process Improvement Digitalization - NGBA steering associated improvements: As the global point of contact for G-EDM Transport Management processes, lead participate in the development, optimization and automation of processes related to all modes of transportation. Guide Supply Chain team members across countries to define the NGBA end-state solution and finalize process models. Conduct regular analysis of existing processes, IT environment, and align with best practices. 3. Change Management - Technical Organizational: Identify global/country specific features and enable NGBA workshops for Transportation Management. Drive role-based training for users across G-EDM. jobs.title: Supervisor, Quality Management_PS&R
jobs.description: 1. Process Improvement Digitalization - NGBA steering associated improvements: As the global point of contact for G-EDM Quality Management and PS R processes, lead participate in the development, optimization and automation of processes related to QM and PS R. Guide functional leads across countries to define the NGBA end-state solution and finalize process models. Conduct regular analysis of existing processes, IT environment, and align with best practices. 2. Change Management - Technical Organizational: Identify global/country specific features and enable NGBA workshops for Quality Management and PS R. Drive role-based training for users across G-EDM. Develop user documentation, process descriptions, guidelines, and procedural instructions. 3. Stakeholder Management Global Coordination: Provide updates to key stakeholders on NGBA implementation progress, achievements, and improvements in Quality Management and PS R. Represent G-EDM in business experts' communities and NGBA forums for Quality Management and PS R topics. Build internal G-EDM Quality Management and PS R expert community.

jobs.title: Supervisor, Manufacturing
jobs.description: 1. Process Improvement Digitalization – NGBA steering associated improvements As the global point of contact for G-EDM Manufacturing processes, lead participate in the development, optimization and automation of processes related to different production sites. Guide production site leads across countries to define the NGBA end-state solution and finalizing process models. Conduct regular analysis of existing processes, IT environment, and best practices to drive further development and alignment. 2. Change Management – Technical Organizational Identify global/country specific features and enable NGBA workshops for Manufacturing. Drive role-based training for users across G-EDM. Develop user documentation, process descriptions, guidelines, and procedural instructions. 3. Stakeholder Management Global Co-ordination Provide regular updates to key stakeholders on NGBA implementation progress, achievements, and improvements in Manufacturing. Represent G-EDM in business experts' communities and NGBA forums for Manufacturing topics. Build an internal G-EDM Manufacturing expert community.
